title: Tobble, the Barkeep
bodyText:
Halfling barkeep of the Duskhollow taproom. Cheerful in front of customers, terrified after dark — he has seen what comes out of the well.

> [!dm] Voice: quick, chirpy, drops to a whisper when the well comes up. He knows the goblins pay someone in town for safe passage, but will only say so if the party covers his debt (12 gp).

# Wants
To sell the taproom and leave before winter.

# Knows
The crypt under the well predates the town. The 'humming' starts on new-moon nights.
